about.title: About Elegant Travel Service
about.subtitle: Morocco's premier travel agency, founded in Marrakech in 2014.
about.heading: Born in Marrakech. Built for Morocco.
about.body1: Elegant Travel Service was founded in 2014 by a team of passionate Moroccan guides and travel professionals who believed that every journey through Morocco should feel personal, honest, and genuinely unforgettable.
about.body2: From our base in Marrakech, we design private and small-group tours that reach every corner of the kingdom — from the Sahara to the Rif mountains, from Fes to the Atlantic coast.
about.metaTitle: About Us | Elegant Travel Service Morocco
about.metaDescription: Discover the story behind Elegant Travel Service — Morocco's most trusted travel agency, founded in Marrakech in 2014 by passionate local guides and travel experts.
about.heroHeading: Crafted in Marrakech. Made for Morocco.
about.heroSubtitle: Since 2014 we have been turning Morocco dreams into memories — one private tour at a time.
about.storyHeading: Born from a love of Morocco
about.storyP1: Elegant Travel Service was founded in 2014 in the heart of Marrakech by a team of passionate Moroccan guides who believed that the best way to experience Morocco was with someone who truly knew it — not a global operator, but a local team who called it home.
about.storyP2: Over a decade later, we have grown into Morocco's most trusted boutique travel agency — designing private and small-group tours that reach the Sahara, the Rif, the Atlantic coast, and every imperial city in between. Every itinerary is built from scratch, every guide is certified and local, and every detail is handled personally.
about.storyP3: We are proud that over 98% of our travellers say they would recommend us to a friend. That trust is everything to us.
about.storyQuote: Morocco is not just a destination — it is a feeling. Our job is to make sure you feel it in every moment of your journey.
about.teamYoussefBio: Born in Marrakech, Youssef has been guiding travellers across Morocco for over 20 years. ONMT-certified, multilingual, and passionate about sharing authentic Moroccan culture.
about.teamFatimaBio: Fatima crafts every bespoke itinerary with meticulous attention to detail. She has personally visited every destination and hotel we recommend.
about.teamHamidBio: Hamid grew up in the Draa Valley on the edge of the Sahara. His knowledge of the desert — its dunes, its stars, its silence — is unmatched.
about.teamAmiraBio: Amira ensures every guest's journey is seamless from first enquiry to final farewell. She speaks English, French, Arabic, and Spanish.
about.valueSmallGroupsDesc: We cap all private and group tours at 12 guests. You'll never be lost in a crowd or rushed through a site.
about.valueSustainableDesc: We work only with local guides, family-run riads, and community cooperatives. Your trip directly benefits Moroccan families.
about.valueInsuredDesc: All ETS tours include comprehensive liability cover and 24/7 emergency support. Your safety is never an afterthought.
about.valueQualityDesc: If something isn't right, we fix it. Our post-trip satisfaction guarantee means we will work until you are happy.
about.valueLocalDesc: Every guide, driver, and partner on your trip is Moroccan. We do not use multinational subcontractors or anonymous operators.
about.valuePricingDesc: No hidden fees, no surprise add-ons. Every quote includes transport, guiding, and entry fees — what you see is what you pay.
about.ctaSubtitle: Let us design your perfect Moroccan journey — from the Sahara to the Atlantic, from Marrakech to Chefchaouen.

destinations.heading: Destinations Worth Discovering
destinations.subheading: From imperial cities to the edge of the Sahara — every corner of Morocco has a story.
destinations.metaDescription: Explore Morocco's most iconic destinations — from the Sahara desert and High Atlas mountains to the imperial cities of Marrakech, Fes and Chefchaouen.
destinations.ogDescription: Discover Morocco's most extraordinary destinations with Elegant Travel Service.
destinations.pageSubtitle: From the golden dunes of the Sahara to the blue streets of Chefchaouen — discover every corner of the kingdom.
destinations.heroSubtext: 8 breathtaking destinations — from the golden Sahara to the azure peaks of the Rif. Each one a complete world.
destinations.gridSubtext: Every destination tells a different story. Desert silence, mountain air, medieval medinas, Atlantic breeze — Morocco holds them all.
destinations.regionSubtext: Not sure where to start? Browse Morocco's four great regions and find the destinations that speak to you.
destinations.ctaHeading: Can't decide which destination is right for you?
destinations.ctaSubtext: Our Morocco specialists have been crafting bespoke itineraries for over 15 years. Tell us your travel style and we'll build your perfect journey.

activities.title: Morocco Activities & Adventures
activities.subtitle: Half-day to full-day experiences — from sunrise balloon rides to desert camel treks.
activities.metaDescription: Half-day to full-day activities in Morocco — hot air balloon rides over Marrakech, Sahara camel treks, hammam spa, and more.
activities.ogDescription: Book unforgettable Morocco activities — from sunrise balloon rides to desert camel treks.
activities.pageSubtitle: Half-day to full-day experiences — curated by our local team for maximum impact.
activities.heroSubtitle: Half-day experiences and full-day excursions from Marrakech — from a sunrise balloon flight to a day trip to the Saharan kasbahs. All back the same evening.
activities.searchPlaceholder: Search — Ouzoud, hammam, balloon, cooking class…
activities.categorySectionHeading: What kind of experience are you after?
activities.emptyText: Try adjusting your search or browse a different category.
activities.crossPromoText: From 2-day desert getaways to 18-day grand Morocco journeys — our tour collection covers the full country with accommodation, guides, and transport all included.
activities.whyBookSubtitle: We have been on the ground in Morocco for over a decade.
activities.benefit1Desc: Every activity is safety-vetted. All guides hold professional certification and full liability insurance.
activities.benefit2Desc: Our local team is reachable around the clock — whether you need rescheduling or on-the-spot help.
activities.benefit3Desc: Licensed, English-speaking Moroccan guides with deep regional knowledge and certified training.
activities.benefit4Desc: Mix and match activities into a bespoke itinerary. We handle all logistics so you just show up.
activities.faq1Q: What is the difference between Activities and Tours?
activities.faq1A: Activities are single-day or half-day experiences. Tours are multi-day journeys that include accommodation.
activities.faq2Q: Do I need prior experience for adventure activities?
activities.faq2A: Most activities are suitable for beginners. Our instructors provide full briefings and all required equipment.
activities.faq3Q: Can I book activities as add-ons to a multi-day tour?
activities.faq3A: Absolutely. Every activity can be added to an existing tour booking. Our team will slot them seamlessly into your itinerary.
activities.faq4Q: What is the cancellation policy for activities?
activities.faq4A: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before the start time. Cancellations within 48 hours receive a 50% refund.
activities.faq5Q: Are activities suitable for families with children?
activities.faq5A: Many activities are family-friendly — camel treks, food tours, balloon rides, Ouzoud waterfalls. Age restrictions are clearly noted.
activities.ctaText: Not sure which activities to combine? Our travel designers will craft a personalised Morocco itinerary around your interests, budget, and travel dates — at no extra cost.

chat.greeting:
Marhaba! Welcome to Elegant Travel Service. I'm Youssef, your personal Morocco travel advisor.

I know every tour, destination, and price on our site. Ask me anything — from budget desert trips to 14-day luxury circuits. What's calling you to Morocco?
chat.fallback: I'd love to help you discover Morocco! Try asking about a specific destination (Sahara, Marrakech, Fes), activity type (trekking, luxury, family), or budget — I'll find the perfect tour for you.
